title: Bao Bites with Cinnamon Sugar
description: A sweet Mexican-inspired dessert made with crispy bao bites coated in cinnamon sugar and served with a side of creamy sweetness.
instructions: Cut the bao into small pieces and place them on a baking sheet.
Mix together cinnamon and sugar in a small bowl.
Sprinkle the cinnamon-sugar mixture evenly over the bao pieces.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
In a separate bowl, whip the cream until stiff peaks form.
Add sweet to the whipped cream and mix until combined.
Serve the crispy bao bites with a dollop of sweet whipped cream on top.
